text:
Really appreciate these notes Paul! I kind of rushed through the demo and didn't really touch on these parts enough.

The markdown prompt file for the Prompt Objects is what defines their behaviors - so even if two POs have a “read_file” capability, their prompts could guide its usage in all kinds of directions: “refuse to read files with a .py extension”, “print any contents from files you read in Spanish”, etc…

And for 2, yeah the thing is that out of the box, without much prompt engineering, these things are at least reasonable and not fully random…so for situations where there's a wide spectrum of correct answers (like that bartender example), these things tend to be a lot easier than programming directly (and able to pull in additional context automatically to get closer to a useful result with a lot less code)
